title: Legs & Core
description: Lower body strength with curtsy lunges, sissy squat and intense plank work

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Hip 90/90
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs at 90 degrees, twist side to side

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Jump spreading arms and legs, return feet together

exercises.name: Pulse squats
exercises.instructions: Stay at the bottom of the squat, small up-down pulses

exercises.name: Single-leg hip thrust
exercises.instructions: Hip thrust on one leg, the other in the air

exercises.name: Sissy squat
exercises.instructions: Lean backward, knees forward, quads on fire

exercises.name: Leg raises
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, lift extended legs to vertical

exercises.name: Side plank
exercises.instructions: On one forearm, body aligned, hips high

exercises.name: Flutter kicks
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, legs extended, quick flutters

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
